title: LynAI Redaction Report (v1.1)
description: Output of agent.redactor after scanning the approved draft + asset metadata. Producer refuses to build unless overall_verdict = CLEAR or = REDACTED (with sanitized draft hash echoed back).

patterns_checked.description: Patterns the scanner ran. Listed so the Producer can verify the scan covered the required minimum (6+).

snippet_redacted.description: The matched text with the sensitive payload replaced by '«REDACTED»'. NEVER include the raw secret.

user_decision.description: When disposition = escalated_to_user, this records the user's call.

overall_verdict.description: CLEAR = nothing found. REDACTED = findings were sanitized in-place (sanitized_draft_hash MUST be set). BLOCKED = critical findings remain; Producer must NOT build.

sanitized_draft_hash.description: Required when overall_verdict = REDACTED. Hash of the draft AFTER redaction. Producer consumes this version; Gate-Keeper re-issues a fresh gate_token bound to this hash.
